hero.title: Mid Full Stack Developer
hero.tagline: Backend-oriented developer building scalable systems with Node.js, Nest.js & React.

about.heading: About me
about.paragraph1: I'm Yesid Hernandez, a mid full stack developer with 6 years of experience. I focus on backend systems and APIs, using Node.js, NestJS, React, and Next.js as my primary stack. I also work with PHP and Laravel, and have solid experience with SQL and NoSQL databases, cloud (AWS, Azure), Docker, and event-driven architectures with Kafka and Redis.
about.paragraph2: I enjoy designing and implementing maintainable services and clean APIs, and I'm always improving my skills in Go and system design.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.subheading: Open to new opportunities and collaborations.
